creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
We have multiple versions hosted on people's personal webdirs that we most likely should hide or simply remove. There are possibly more but these are what I found doing a simple search using Google.

https://people.freebsd.org/~rodrigc/doc/handbook/makeworld.html
https://people.freebsd.org/~trhodes/doc/handbook/index.html
https://people.freebsd.org/~blackend/doc/handbook/index.html
https://people.freebsd.org/~nik/book.pdf.gz
https://people.freebsd.org/~meganm/data/docs.html
